final:
module sram_cell (  
    input wire [7:0] data_in,  
    input wire we,  
    output reg [7:0] data_out  
);  
    // Internal cell_data for the SRAM cell  
    reg [7:0] cell_data;  
  
    always @(we or data_in) begin  
        if (we) begin  
            cell_data <= data_in;  // Write data to cell_data  
        end  
    end  
  
    always @(*) begin  
        data_out = cell_data;  // Output stored data  
    end  
endmodule
